fix: resolve dynamic naming conflicts for Vercel deployment

Fixed 19 files where ''dynamic'' was defined multiple times:
- export const dynamic = "force-dynamic" (Next.js config)
- import dynamic from "next/dynamic" (dynamic imports)

Renamed dynamic import to dynamicImport to avoid conflicts.
This enables successful Vercel deployment.
